management_notes: CEO Darcy Christian (P.Geo.) leads with technical credibility as a qualified person under NI 43-101. Noah Komavli appointed President in May 2025 with capital markets background. Jody Dahrouge (P.Geo.) added to advisory board in 2025. Team is lean and early-stage; insider ownership levels not verified from public sources. Limited track record advancing to resource stage.
geology_notes: Multiple early-stage gold properties in the Dryden area of NW Ontario (Burnthut, Howie, Alto-Gardnar, Tak, Sakoose). Channel sampling at Katisha Zone returned up to 20.2 g/t Au confirming continuity; surface samples up to 5.8 g/t Au at Tabor-Sakoose. IP survey at Tak revealed a 1km resistive trend adjacent to NexGold's Goliath-Gold Complex. No NI 43-101 resource estimate on any property. Pre-resource stage with encouraging high-grade hits.
capital_notes: 63M shares issued, 118.9M fully diluted as of April 2026 (per NI 62-103 Early Warning Report). The ~1.9x ratio of fully diluted to issued shares indicates heavy warrant/option overhang. Recent Nov-Dec 2025 financing issued units with half-warrants at $0.12-$0.15. Market cap ~C$5.6M. Significant warrant overhang relative to issued count is a concern at this valuation.
catalyst_notes: Drill crew mobilized for Tak property February 2026; Alto-Gardnar drilling permit received March 25, 2026. Both represent near-term catalysts with drill results expected in 2026. BC property (Gold Mountain) also advancing with bond posted Feb 2026. Multiple upcoming drill programs provide several windows for positive newsflow.
acquisition_notes: No NI 43-101 resource estimate on any property makes P/NAV calculation impossible. The company is in early exploration with no resource to value against comparable transaction metrics. Acquisition value is purely optionality on early-stage drill targets.
analyst_summary: Ashley Gold is a micro-cap early-stage explorer with a promising land package in Ontario's Dryden area adjacent to NexGold's Goliath complex, but with no NI 43-101 resource on any property. The fully diluted share count of ~119M against an issued count of ~63M represents substantial warrant overhang. Near-term drill results from Tak and Alto-Gardnar are the key catalysts to watch, but the risk profile is high given pre-resource status and the dilutive capital structure.
